output.dependency: The flight identifier appears to determine the related schedule/timing fields: a route-like flight code is paired with departure and arrival times shown in different formats, with the same times repeating across records for that flight.
The two time fields appear to be linked as a scheduled time versus a corresponding updated/actual time, both using the same date-time style format.
The two later time fields appear to be linked as another pair of schedule versus actual/updated times, again expressed in clock-time format with an AM/PM indicator.
